scripts.test:api: npx newman run ./multi-tenant-hr-backend.postman_collection.json -e ./mthrb-local.postman_environment.json --env-var base_url=http://localhost --env-var company_service=company-a/api/v1 --env-var attendance_service=attendance/api/v1 --env-var companyId=A --reporters cli
scripts.load-test:ratelimit: k6 run -e ENABLE_CHECKIN=false -e ENABLE_REPORT=false -e ENABLE_RATELIMIT=true load-test/src/k6-attendance.js
